steps.prompt: How do you say 'hello' politely as a male speaker?
steps.answer: สวัสดีครับ (sà-wàt-dii khráp)

steps.prompt: A woman thanks someone politely. Write it in Thai with romanization.
steps.answer: ขอบคุณค่ะ (khàwp-khun khâ)

steps.prompt: Which first-person pronoun does a male speaker normally use?
steps.answer: ผม (phǒm)

steps.prompt: Translate 'you' (polite, neutral).
steps.answer: คุณ (khun)

steps.prompt: Translate 'mother' and 'father' into Thai with romanization.
steps.answer: แม่ (mâe), พ่อ (phâw)

steps.prompt: What word means 'older sibling / older person'?
steps.answer: พี่ (phîi)

steps.prompt: Count from one to three in Thai (romanization).
steps.answer: nùeng, sǎwng, sǎam

steps.prompt: What is the Thai word for 'five'?
steps.answer: ห้า (hâa)

steps.prompt: Translate 'rice' and 'water'.
steps.answer: ข้าว (khâao), น้ำ (náam)

steps.prompt: Say 'Thai food' in Thai.
steps.answer: อาหารไทย (aa-hǎan thai)

steps.prompt: A female speaker ends a QUESTION. Which particle does she use?
steps.answer: คะ (khá, high tone)

steps.prompt: A female speaker ends a STATEMENT. Which particle does she use?
steps.answer: ค่ะ (khâ, falling tone)

steps.prompt: Which particle do male speakers use to be polite?
steps.answer: ครับ (khráp)

steps.prompt: ไม่ goes BEFORE what part of speech (verb/adjective or noun)?
steps.answer: before the verb or adjective

steps.prompt: Say 'I am not hungry' (male speaker, polite).
steps.answer: ผมไม่หิวครับ (phǒm mâi hǐw khráp)

steps.prompt: Turn ชอบ (to like) into 'do not like'.
steps.answer: ไม่ชอบ (mâi châwp)

steps.prompt: Where do you add ไหม (mǎi) to make a yes/no question?
steps.answer: at the end of the sentence

steps.prompt: Ask 'Is it delicious?' in Thai.
steps.answer: อร่อยไหม (à-ràwy mǎi)

steps.prompt: Ask 'Do you have (it)?' politely.
steps.answer: มีไหมครับ / มีไหมคะ (mii mǎi khráp/khá)

title: Asking 'How much?' with เท่าไหร่

steps.prompt: Ask 'How much is it?' (price) in Thai.
steps.answer: เท่าไหร่ (thâo-rài) or ราคาเท่าไหร่ (raa-khaa thâo-rài)

steps.prompt: The vendor says it is 50 baht. Write the number + baht.
steps.answer: ห้าสิบบาท (hâa-sìp bàat)

title: Time Markers: จะ (future) and แล้ว (already)

steps.prompt: Which word before a verb marks the future ('will')?
steps.answer: จะ (jà)

steps.prompt: Say 'I have already eaten.' (male speaker).
steps.answer: ผมกินข้าวแล้ว (phǒm kin khâao láaeo)

steps.prompt: Say 'Tomorrow I will go to work.'
steps.answer: พรุ่งนี้ผมจะไปทำงาน (phrûng-níi phǒm jà pai tham-ngaan)

steps.prompt: Audio (woman): 'สวัสดีค่ะ ยินดีที่ได้รู้จัก' (sà-wàt-dii khâ, yin-dii thîi dâi rúu-jàk). What is she doing?
steps.answer: Greeting and saying 'nice to meet you.'

steps.prompt: From the audio, how do you know the speaker is female?
steps.answer: She ends with ค่ะ (khâ).

steps.prompt: Audio (vendor): 'อันนี้ห้าสิบบาทค่ะ' (an níi hâa-sìp bàat khâ). How much does the item cost?
steps.answer: 50 baht (ห้าสิบบาท).

steps.prompt: Is the vendor male or female? How can you tell?
steps.answer: Female, because she uses ค่ะ (khâ).

steps.prompt: Audio (customer): 'ขอกาแฟหนึ่งแก้วครับ' (khǎw kaa-fae nùeng kâew khráp). What does he order and how many?
steps.answer: One glass of coffee (กาแฟ หนึ่งแก้ว).

steps.prompt: What polite particle tells you the speaker is male?
steps.answer: ครับ (khráp).

steps.prompt: Audio: 'ห้องน้ำอยู่ทางซ้ายค่ะ' (hâwng-náam yùu thaang-sáai khâ). Where is the bathroom?
steps.answer: On the left (ทางซ้าย).

steps.prompt: What place is being asked about?
steps.answer: The bathroom / toilet (ห้องน้ำ).

steps.prompt: Audio: 'วันนี้ร้อนมาก' (wan-níi ráwn mâak). What is today's weather like?
steps.answer: Very hot (ร้อนมาก).

steps.prompt: Which word means 'today' in the clip?
steps.answer: วันนี้ (wan-níi).

steps.prompt: Audio (man): 'ผมชื่อสมชาย ผมเป็นคนไทย' (phǒm chûe sǒm-chaai, phǒm pen khon thai). What is his name and nationality?
steps.answer: His name is Somchai and he is Thai.

steps.prompt: What does เป็นคนไทย (pen khon thai) mean?
steps.answer: 'to be Thai / a Thai person.'

steps.prompt: Audio: 'อิ่มแล้ว อร่อยมากค่ะ' (ìm láew, à-ràwy mâak khâ). How does the speaker feel about the meal?
steps.answer: She is full and thought it was very delicious.

steps.prompt: What does อิ่มแล้ว (ìm láew) mean?
steps.answer: 'I'm full now.'

steps.prompt: Audio: 'พรุ่งนี้วันจันทร์' (phrûng-níi wan-jan). What day is tomorrow?
steps.answer: Monday (วันจันทร์).

steps.prompt: Which word means 'tomorrow'?
steps.answer: พรุ่งนี้ (phrûng-níi).

steps.prompt: Audio (man): 'ผมรู้สึกไม่สบาย ปวดหัว' (phǒm rúu-sùek mâi sà-baai, pùat-hǔa). What is wrong with him?
steps.answer: He feels unwell and has a headache.

steps.prompt: What does ปวดหัว (pùat-hǔa) mean?
steps.answer: 'headache / my head hurts.'

title: Listening: Making a Plan by Phone

steps.prompt: Audio (woman): 'เดี๋ยวฉันโทรหาคุณนะคะ' (dǐao chǎn thoo hǎa khun ná khá). What will she do?
steps.answer: She will call you in a moment.

steps.prompt: Which verb means 'to call / phone' in the clip?
steps.answer: โทร (thoo).

steps.prompt: Write a polite morning greeting to your teacher, as a female speaker.
steps.answer: สวัสดีค่ะ อาจารย์ (sà-wàt-dii khâ, aa-jaan)

steps.prompt: Write 'My name is Anna' as a female speaker (use ฉัน).
steps.answer: ฉันชื่อแอนนา (chǎn chûe aan-nâa)

title: Writing: Order One Plate of Rice

steps.prompt: Write 'One plate of chicken rice, please' as a male speaker.
steps.answer: ขอข้าวไก่หนึ่งจานครับ (khǎw khâao kài nùeng jaan khráp)

steps.prompt: Write 'Two people' (for a table at a restaurant).
steps.answer: สองคน (sǎwng khon)

steps.prompt: Write 'How much is this?' politely (female speaker).
steps.answer: อันนี้เท่าไหร่คะ (an níi thâo-rài khá)

title: Writing: Ask Where the Bathroom Is

steps.prompt: Write 'Where is the bathroom?' politely.
steps.answer: ห้องน้ำอยู่ไหนครับ / ห้องน้ำอยู่ไหนคะ (hâwng-náam yùu nǎi khráp/khá)

steps.prompt: Write 'I don't eat spicy food' (male speaker).
steps.answer: ผมไม่กินเผ็ดครับ (phǒm mâi kin phèt khráp)

steps.prompt: Write 'Thank you very much' as a female speaker.
steps.answer: ขอบคุณมากค่ะ (khàwp-khun mâak khâ)

steps.prompt: Write 'Next week I will go to Chiang Mai' (male speaker, use จะ).
steps.answer: อาทิตย์หน้าผมจะไปเชียงใหม่ (aa-thít nâa phǒm jà pai chiang-mài)

steps.prompt: Write 'Today I am very tired but happy' (male speaker; use เหนื่อย and มีความสุข).
steps.answer: วันนี้ผมเหนื่อยมากแต่มีความสุข (wan-níi phǒm nùeay mâak tàae mii khwaam sùk)

steps.prompt: VENDOR: 'อันนี้ร้อยบาทค่ะ' (an níi ráwy bàat khâ). Respond that it's expensive and ask if it can be cheaper.
steps.answer: แพงไปครับ ลดได้ไหมครับ (phaaeng pai khráp, lót dâai mǎi khráp)

steps.prompt: Agree to buy it and say thank you (male speaker).
steps.answer: เอาครับ ขอบคุณครับ (ao khráp, khàwp-khun khráp)

steps.prompt: You sit down. Ask the server for the menu (female speaker).
steps.answer: ขอเมนูหน่อยค่ะ (khǎw mee-nuu nàwy khâ)

steps.prompt: SERVER: 'รับอะไรดีคะ' (ráp à-rai dii khá). Order fried rice and one water.
steps.answer: ขอข้าวผัดกับน้ำหนึ่งที่ครับ (khǎw khâao-phàt kàp náam nùeng thîi khráp)

steps.prompt: Tell the taxi driver you want to go to the airport (male speaker).
steps.answer: ไปสนามบินครับ (pai sà-nǎam-bin khráp)

steps.prompt: Ask how much it will cost.
steps.answer: เท่าไหร่ครับ (thâo-rài khráp)

steps.prompt: Greet the person and say 'nice to meet you' (female speaker).
steps.answer: สวัสดีค่ะ ยินดีที่ได้รู้จักค่ะ (sà-wàt-dii khâ, yin-dii thîi dâi rúu-jàk khâ)

steps.prompt: They ask your name: 'คุณชื่ออะไรคะ' (khun chûe à-rai khá). Answer that your name is Nina.
steps.answer: ฉันชื่อนีน่าค่ะ (chǎn chûe nii-nâa khâ)

steps.prompt: Tell the pharmacist you have a headache and ask for medicine (male speaker).
steps.answer: ผมปวดหัว ขอยาหน่อยครับ (phǒm pùat-hǔa, khǎw yaa nàwy khráp)

steps.prompt: PHARMACIST: 'เป็นมากี่วันแล้วคะ' (pen maa kìi wan láew khá). Say 'two days.'
steps.answer: สองวันแล้วครับ (sǎwng wan láew khráp)
